## What does this change?

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited `manual.md` (English) and/or `manual.fr.md` (French) — **not** the generated `docs/index.html`.
- [ ] If I changed one language only, I noted whether the other needs the same change.
- [ ] Any new images live under `manual_assets/` or `screengrabs/` and are referenced by relative path.

> The published site (`docs/index.html`) is rebuilt automatically from the Markdown when this PR is merged — you don't need to build it yourself.
